name_en: 【Genuine Leather】Kate_ Reversible Suede & Smooth Leather, buying one bag is like owning two, great value. The eternal classic Kate, no need to worry about it going out of style, a style suitable for all seasons. Use smooth leather in spring/summer, and suede in autumn/winter! The chain is detachable!
